title: When the Screen Goes Dark
synopsis: A living acorn named Acorn tells a small lie about a magical screen in a cozy mountain cabin, but as he keeps returning to the warm fireplace, his fib grows bigger and causes more problems, until he learns the joy of putting down devices and enjoying real warmth.

pages.text: Smoke curls up from the chimney top, wind howls round the cabin walls, and here comes trouble hopping through the door! Acorn tumbles in from the swirling snow, his leaf feet dripping wet, his cap all shiny from the storm. 'Brrr!' he chatters, hop-hop-hopping to the fire. 'So cold, so cold, so very very cold!' The flames dance orange and red, crackling snap-pop-hiss, warming his tiny stick arms right up.

illustration.description: Acorn, a living sentient acorn with a shiny brown cap, tiny stick arms, leaf feet, and bright dark eyes painted on the nut, hops through the wooden door of a snowbound mountain cabin. Snow swirls behind him while a stone fireplace crackles with orange flames. The scene uses exaggerated cartoon style with squash and stretch proportions, oversized expressions, candy bright colors, bouncy dynamic energy, comedic poses, slapstick feel, and rubber hose animation aesthetic.
illustration.alt: Acorn enters a cozy cabin from a snowstorm, heading toward a warm fireplace

pages.text: But what's that glowing on the table there? A magic screen, all bright and square! It shows pictures that move and dance, colors that shimmer and shine and prance. 'Oh my!' says Acorn, eyes growing wide. 'I must have this!' he says with pride. But the screen belongs to someone else, sitting silent on the wooden shelf.

illustration.description: Acorn, a living sentient acorn with a shiny brown cap, tiny stick arms, leaf feet, and bright dark eyes painted on the nut, stares with giant amazed eyes at a glowing tablet on a wooden table. The cabin interior shows rustic beams, the crackling fireplace, and snow-covered windows. The scene uses exaggerated cartoon style with squash and stretch proportions, oversized expressions, candy bright colors, bouncy dynamic energy, comedic poses, slapstick feel, and rubber hose animation aesthetic.
illustration.alt: Acorn discovers a glowing tablet screen in the mountain cabin

pages.text: When the cabin owner walks inside, stamping boots and breathing sighs, Acorn quick-quick tells a lie: 'That screen? Oh yes, that screen is mine! I brought it here, it's really fine, I use it all the time!' The words tumble out like falling stones, bounce and roll with worried tones. Back to the fire he hop-hops fast, hoping this moment soon will pass.

illustration.description: Acorn, a living sentient acorn with a shiny brown cap, tiny stick arms, leaf feet, and bright dark eyes painted on the nut, speaks nervously to a tall human figure in winter boots and coat. Word bubbles show his lie floating in the air. The cozy cabin has wooden walls, a stone fireplace crackling with flames, and snow visible through windows. The scene uses exaggerated cartoon style with squash and stretch proportions, oversized expressions, candy bright colors, bouncy dynamic energy, comedic poses, slapstick feel, and rubber hose animation aesthetic.
illustration.alt: Acorn tells a lie to the cabin owner about the tablet belonging to him

pages.text: Back to the fire, back to the flame, but nothing feels quite the same! The owner says, 'Well, if it's yours, you can help me with some chores! Use your screen to find the way to fix my door that blew away!' Acorn's cap starts spinning round, his leaf feet barely touch the ground. 'Oh dear, oh my, oh what to do? This lie is growing bigger too!'

illustration.description: Acorn, a living sentient acorn with a shiny brown cap, tiny stick arms, leaf feet, and bright dark eyes painted on the nut, spins anxiously by the crackling fireplace. The cabin owner points to a broken door hanging off its hinges while snow blows in. The warm fire contrasts with the cold draft. The scene uses exaggerated cartoon style with squash and stretch proportions, oversized expressions, candy bright colors, bouncy dynamic energy, comedic poses, slapstick feel, and rubber hose animation aesthetic.
illustration.alt: Acorn feels worried as the cabin owner asks him to use 'his' tablet to help fix the broken door

pages.text: He hop-hops to the glowing square, pretends to tap with careful care, but really doesn't know at all how magic screens work, big or small! The pictures flash and colors blur, his tiny stick arms start to whir. 'Um, maybe later?' Acorn squeaks. 'The door can wait another week!' Back to the fire, back he goes, but worry in his bright eye grows.

illustration.description: Acorn, a living sentient acorn with a shiny brown cap, tiny stick arms, leaf feet, and bright dark eyes painted on the nut, pretends to use the tablet with confused expression. Colorful app icons and swirling digital patterns surround him. The stone fireplace glows warmly in the background of the snowbound cabin. The scene uses exaggerated cartoon style with squash and stretch proportions, oversized expressions, candy bright colors, bouncy dynamic energy, comedic poses, slapstick feel, and rubber hose animation aesthetic.
illustration.alt: Acorn pretends to know how to use the tablet but is clearly confused

pages.text: Back to the fire, back once more, but now there's knocking at the door! Three little creatures, cold and small, have heard about the screen for all. 'Please help us!' they shiver-shake. 'Our map got lost in the snowflake!' They think that Acorn's screen can show the safest way for them to go. But Acorn's lie grows bigger still, tumbling down like rocks down hill!

illustration.description: Three small woodland creatures (a rabbit, squirrel, and mouse) knock at the cabin door while Acorn, a living sentient acorn with a shiny brown cap, tiny stick arms, leaf feet, and bright dark eyes painted on the nut, stands by the crackling fireplace looking increasingly worried. Snow swirls outside the windows of the mountain cabin. The scene uses exaggerated cartoon style with squash and stretch proportions, oversized expressions, candy bright colors, bouncy dynamic energy, comedic poses, slapstick feel, and rubber hose animation aesthetic.
illustration.alt: Three small animals ask Acorn for help with directions using his tablet

pages.text: His cap starts wobbling left and right, his leaf feet dance with worried fright! 'The screen is... um... it's... well, you see...' The words get tangled like a tree. Everyone's looking, everyone's waiting, and Acorn's heart is racing-racing! The fire crackles warm and bright, but nothing feels quite right tonight. The lie has grown too big to hold, bigger than stories ever told!

illustration.description: Acorn, a living sentient acorn with a shiny brown cap, tiny stick arms, leaf feet, and bright dark eyes painted on the nut, looks panicked with sweat drops flying as the cabin owner and three woodland creatures all stare at him expectantly. The tablet glows ominously on the table while the fireplace crackles in the background. The scene uses exaggerated cartoon style with squash and stretch proportions, oversized expressions, candy bright colors, bouncy dynamic energy, comedic poses, slapstick feel, and rubber hose animation aesthetic.
illustration.alt: Acorn panics as everyone expects him to use the tablet he claimed was his

pages.text: Back to the fire one final time, but now he knows he's crossed the line. 'Wait!' squeaks Acorn, voice so small. 'I have to tell the truth to all! That screen's not mine, I told a lie, because it looked so bright and high!' The words come tumbling out like rain, washing away his worry-pain. Everyone stares, then someone laughs, 'We've all told fibs and silly gaffs!'

illustration.description: Acorn, a living sentient acorn with a shiny brown cap, tiny stick arms, leaf feet, and bright dark eyes painted on the nut, confesses with tears in his eyes while the cabin owner and woodland creatures gather around the warm crackling fireplace. The tablet sits forgotten on the table as everyone focuses on Acorn. The scene uses exaggerated cartoon style with squash and stretch proportions, oversized expressions, candy bright colors, bouncy dynamic energy, comedic poses, slapstick feel, and rubber hose animation aesthetic.
illustration.alt: Acorn confesses the truth about the tablet to everyone gathered around the fireplace

pages.text: The cabin owner puts the screen away, 'We don't need this anyway! Let's fix the door with hammer-pounds, let's make a map with sight and sounds!' They work together, laugh and play, no glowing screen to lead astray. The fire crackles, warm and true, and Acorn learns what friends can do. Back to the fire, but this time right, sharing stories through the night!

illustration.description: Acorn, a living sentient acorn with a shiny brown cap, tiny stick arms, leaf feet, and bright dark eyes painted on the nut, helps fix the cabin door alongside the owner and woodland creatures. Tools and wooden planks scatter around while the tablet sits closed in a drawer. The stone fireplace glows warmly as snow falls outside the repaired cabin windows. The scene uses exaggerated cartoon style with squash and stretch proportions, oversized expressions, candy bright colors, bouncy dynamic energy, comedic poses, slapstick feel, and rubber hose animation aesthetic.
illustration.alt: Everyone works together to fix the cabin without needing the tablet, gathered around the cozy fireplace

pages.text: When morning comes with golden light, Acorn knows he did what's right. The fire's warm, the friends are real, better than any screen could feel. 'Back to the fire!' he sings with glee. 'This is where I want to be!' No lies to tumble, no lies to grow, just friendship's warm and happy glow. The screen stays dark, the fire burns bright, and everything feels just right!

illustration.description: Acorn, a living sentient acorn with a shiny brown cap, tiny stick arms, leaf feet, and bright dark eyes painted on the nut, dances happily by the crackling fireplace with the cabin owner and woodland creatures. Golden morning sunlight streams through clean windows, illuminating the cozy repaired cabin. The tablet remains closed and forgotten while everyone enjoys hot cocoa by the fire. The scene uses exaggerated cartoon style with squash and stretch proportions, oversized expressions, candy bright colors, bouncy dynamic energy, comedic poses, slapstick feel, and rubber hose animation aesthetic.
illustration.alt: Acorn and friends celebrate around the fireplace on a sunny morning, with the tablet put away

coverPrompt.description: Acorn, a living sentient acorn with a shiny brown cap, tiny stick arms, leaf feet, and bright dark eyes painted on the nut, sits by a crackling stone fireplace in a snowbound mountain cabin. Snow piles against frosted windows while orange flames dance. The scene has exaggerated cartoon style with squash and stretch proportions, oversized expressions, candy bright colors, bouncy dynamic energy, comedic poses, slapstick feel, and rubber hose animation aesthetic.
coverPrompt.alt: An acorn character with stick arms and leaf feet sits by a cozy fireplace in a snowy cabin

questions.question: What does Acorn lie about?
questions.explanation: Acorn lies that the magic screen belongs to him when it really belongs to the cabin owner.

questions.question: Where does Acorn keep going back to?
questions.explanation: Throughout the story, Acorn keeps returning to the warm crackling fire in the fireplace.

questions.question: What happens to Acorn's lie as the story goes on?
questions.explanation: Acorn's lie grows bigger and causes more problems as more characters ask him to use 'his' screen.

questions.question: How many small creatures come asking for help?
questions.explanation: Three little woodland creatures come to the door asking for help with directions.

questions.question: How does the story end?
questions.explanation: The story ends with Acorn and his friends enjoying the warm fire together, with the screen put away.
